reforms.description: A committee will present a report on strengthening incentives to commercialise publicly-funded research by sharing intellectual property rights between the researcher and the institution, aiming to enhance the organisational structure and expertise for effective research commercialisation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing commercialisation of research is expected to lead to increased innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but is not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform aims to significantly improve the commercialisation process, which is crucial for translating research into economic benefits.
reforms.source_quote: Strengthen incentives to commercialise publicly-funded research by sharing intellectual property rights between the researcher and the institution.

reforms.description: Sweden's healthcare system has been recognized for its innovative approaches, particularly in the decentralization of care delivery, allowing county councils to adopt flexible operational structures and implement successful healthcare models.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Decentralization and flexibility in healthcare delivery can lead to improved efficiency and innovation in service provision.
reforms.status_evidence: The innovative approaches in the healthcare system have been recognized and are currently in practice.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant shift in how healthcare is delivered, promoting innovation in operational structures.
reforms.source_quote: The system is innovative and flexible... Some counties have run with this freedom and have been at the leading edge of international trends in healthcare.
